subcodes.first_line: The Word of God speaketh with truth from this Station which God hath made the Dawning-Place of His Revelation, the Source of His signs, and the Manifestation of His Cause [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کلمه الله تنطق بالحق فی هذا المقام الذی جعله الله مشرق وحیه و مطلع آیاته و مظهر امره
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @Crimson Ark; the Ark of God
